summary: Marketplace → Library flow verified working correctly. Bug fix for is_mine field confirmed successful. All 8 test features passed.

marketplace_to_library_flow.1_navigate_marketplace: PASS - Marketplace page loads at /marketplace, shows 9 games with Free badges
marketplace_to_library_flow.2_find_free_game: PASS - Free games visible with 'Free' badge, 'Get Free' button on listing page
marketplace_to_library_flow.3_click_get_free: PASS - 'Get Free' button clickable, acquires game successfully
marketplace_to_library_flow.4_success_toast: PASS - Toast shows 'Game added to your library!' after acquisition
marketplace_to_library_flow.5_navigate_my_games: PASS - /dashboard/games route loads My Games page correctly
marketplace_to_library_flow.6_click_saved_tab: PASS - Saved tab is clickable and switches content
marketplace_to_library_flow.7_acquired_game_appears: PASS - 'Math Quiz for Testing (My Version)' appears in Saved tab
marketplace_to_library_flow.8_game_card_display: PASS - Card shows thumbnail, title, creator name ('by Teacher Two'), Play button on hover

quick_stats_verification.created_count: 2 - User's own games (Islands of the Compass Crown, Multiplication Monster Showdown)

is_mine_field_fix.bug_description: 500 error on /api/marketplace/my-library due to 'MarketplaceListing object has no field is_mine'
is_mine_field_fix.fix_verified: PASS - is_mine field now exists in MarketplaceListing model (line 204), correctly set in my-library endpoint
is_mine_field_fix.separation_working: PASS - Games with is_mine=true (user's own) appear in Created tab, is_mine=false (acquired) appear in Saved tab

features_verified: Marketplace page loads correctly with Free game badges - WORKING
Game listing page shows 'Get Free' button for free games - WORKING
Acquire game flow adds game to library with success toast - WORKING
My Games page at /dashboard/games loads correctly - WORKING
Saved tab filters to show only acquired (is_mine=false) free games - WORKING
Game card displays thumbnail, title, creator name correctly - WORKING
Play button visible on game card hover - WORKING
Quick stats show correct counts for Created/Saved/Purchased - WORKING
context_for_next_testing_agent: Marketplace to Library flow fully working. Acquire game via 'Get Free' button -> game appears in My Games 'Saved' tab. is_mine field correctly separates Created (user's own games) from Saved (acquired free games). Test user: test@adventure.com / test123456. Acquired game: 'Math Quiz for Testing (My Version)' by Teacher Two.

rca_of_issue.original_bug: 500 error on /api/marketplace/my-library - 'MarketplaceListing object has no field is_mine'
rca_of_issue.root_cause: is_mine field was being added to the response dict but was not defined in the Pydantic model
rca_of_issue.fix_applied: 1) Added is_mine: bool = False field to MarketplaceListing model (line 204), 2) Converted model to dict before adding is_mine flag in my-library endpoint
rca_of_issue.verification: Flow now works end-to-end: acquire game -> appears in Saved tab with correct is_mine=false filtering
